description: A comprehensive, compliant web archiving and data collection tool for authorized personal backups, owned sites, and public domain content.
core_capabilities: Complete website cloning (pages, assets, styles, scripts, media, fonts)
Deep content discovery (sitemaps, robots.txt, internal links, unlinked public pages)
Universal media downloading (images, video, audio, documents)
Smart content extraction (structured data, public APIs, RSS, JSON)
Full-site mirroring with offline functionality (link rewriting)
advanced_features: Headless browser rendering (Puppeteer/Playwright) for JS-heavy sites
Session/Cookie support for authenticated user workflows
Form interaction for authorized login/search processes
Configurable rate limiting and robots.txt adherence
